2. **Choose the Location**: Decide where you want to place the sprite.

sprite = "your_selected_sprite"  # Replace with the actual sprite name
location = "top left corner"  # Replace with the actual location
bring_sprite(sprite, location)
```

Remember to replace `"your_selected_sprite"` with the actual name of the sprite you want to bring, and `"top left corner"` with the actual location where you want to place it.

This will bring the selected sprite to the specified location.
